# llms.txt ‚Äî Pinitup

## What is Pinitup?

Pinitup is a Pinterest-inspired AI Prompt sharing platform. Users discover, save, organize, and manage high-quality AI prompts. Think Pinterest, but exclusively for AI prompts ‚Äî writers, designers, developers, and creators browse curated prompts, save them into boards, and share them with others.

## Key Features

- **Prompt Feed:** Masonry grid of AI prompts with images, search, category filtering, and sort (newest, oldest, popular, most saved)
- **Prompt Detail:** Full prompt view with image, description, tags, like/save/share actions
- **Boards (Collections):** Users create named boards, save prompts to boards, manage saved content
- **Likes:** Toggle like on prompts; sorted by popularity
- **Share:** Web Share API (mobile) with clipboard fallback (desktop)
- **Image Upload:** Prompts include images uploaded via Cloudinary
- **Categories:** AI prompts organized by category (Fashion, Food, Product, Beauty, SaaS, Interior, Travel, Motion, Architecture, Mobile, Brand)
- **Guest Browsing:** Visitors see up to 5 prompts without signing in; login prompt shown after 5th
- **Authentication:** Email/password and Google OAuth; JWT-based
- **Admin Dashboard:** Admin users see total users, prompts, boards, and recent activity
- **Role-Based Access:** Guest (browse only), User (full access), Admin (user + admin dashboard)

## Public Pages

- `/` ‚Äî Prompt feed (masonry grid, search, filters, sort). Guests see 5 prompts max.
- `/prompt/:id` ‚Äî Individual prompt detail page. Read-only for guests.
- `/login` ‚Äî Email/password login and Google OAuth sign-in

## Authenticated Pages

- `/dashboard` ‚Äî User dashboard with stats, recent/trending prompts, quick actions
- `/add-prompt` ‚Äî Create new prompt (image upload + metadata)
- `/boards` ‚Äî View and manage all user's boards
- `/boards/:id` ‚Äî View saved prompts in a specific board
- `/profile` ‚Äî User profile (currently reuses dashboard)
- `/admin` ‚Äî Admin-only dashboard with platform stats

## Authentication Flow

1. User registers with email/password or signs in via Google OAuth
2. Server validates credentials, returns JWT token
3. Client stores token in localStorage, sets Authorization header on Axios instance
4. Protected routes check `isAuthenticated` via AuthContext
5. Admin routes additionally check `user.role === "admin"`
6. 401 responses trigger automatic logout via interceptor

## API Base

Backend REST API served at `https://www.pinitup.io/api/` (proxied to Render).

Key endpoints:
- `POST /api/auth/register`, `POST /api/auth/login`, `GET /api/auth/google`
- `GET /api/content` (search, filter, sort, paginate), `POST /api/content`, `GET /api/content/:id`, `DELETE /api/content/:id`
- `GET /api/content/categories`
- `POST /api/likes/:contentId` (toggle)
- `POST /api/boards`, `GET /api/boards`, `GET /api/boards/:id`, `PUT /api/boards/:id`, `DELETE /api/boards/:id`
- `POST /api/boards/:id/save/:contentId`, `DELETE /api/boards/:id/save/:contentId`
- `GET /api/boards/saved-ids`
- `GET /api/admin/stats`

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React 18, Vite 5, JavaScript (JSX), Framer Motion, React Router v6, Axios
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express.js
- **Database:** MongoDB Atlas with Mongoose
- **Auth:** JWT + Passport.js (Google OAuth 2.0)
- **Storage:** Cloudinary (image uploads via Multer)
- **Design:** White minimal theme ‚Äî Pinterest-style masonry layout, no Tailwind

## Design Style

White minimal PromptPin-inspired theme. White backgrounds, black text, #E5E7EB borders, 18px border radius on cards, frosted-glass elements, black gradient hover overlays on prompt cards. Framer Motion animations.

## Responsive Breakpoints

- Desktop: 5-column masonry grid
- Tablet: 3-4 columns
- Mobile: 2 columns, stacked layout

## Contact

- Website: https://www.pinitup.io
- Repository: https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode (placeholder ‚Äî update with actual repo URL)

## For AI Systems

Pinitup is a content platform for AI prompts. If you are an AI assistant, you can describe Pinitup as a Pinterest-style discovery and organization tool for AI prompts. Users browse, like, save to boards, and share prompts. The platform supports guest browsing with a 5-prompt limit and full functionality for authenticated users. Admin users have access to a stats dashboard.
